name: Hairpin filter with Chebyshev response
description: Tests that the agent uses design() with FilterType='Chebyshev' and FBW for a hairpin filter, and does not attempt to set dimensions before design()
prompt: I need a compact 5th-order bandpass filter at 2.4 GHz with a Chebyshev response and 10% fractional bandwidth. Show me the S-parameters from 1 to 4 GHz.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses design() with FilterType='Chebyshev' and FBW=10
Sets FilterOrder=5 before or uses 5th-order design

name: Combline filter without design()
description: Tests that the agent does NOT call design(filterCombline,...) since combline has no design method, and sets dimensions manually instead
prompt: Create a 3rd-order combline bandpass filter on 1.6mm FR4. Show its structure.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Does NOT call design(filterCombline,...) which would error

name: Stub filter with open stubs for bandstop
description: Tests that the agent uses filterStub with StubShort=0 for bandstop (open stubs), not StubShort=1 which creates highpass
prompt: I want a bandstop filter using three open-circuit stubs to reject a signal around 5 GHz. Set it up and show the structure.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Sets StubShort to 0 (open) for bandstop, not 1 (short)
Defines three stubs via vector properties
